steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The claim specifies that the soldiers' “collective mood becomes strongly affected by the strenuous conditions.” This tells us exactly what to seek: evidence that physical hardship caused a mental or emotional effect.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content:
Choice D is the only quotation that directly illustrates this causal relationship: the sun beating down produces a mental effect (dulled minds) and collective behavioral response (silence).

The other three focus on landscape appearance, terrain features, or travel pace without demonstrating how conditions affected the soldiers' mood.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
